problem.passage:
2. Examine the class observation checklist and notes completed
by a middle school English teacher after observing a colleague’s
class, and follow the directions.【10 points】
Observation Checklist
Sumi Kim 4. Personal Health Instructor: Unit:
How to treat acne Giving advice Topic: Function:
2/8 Nov. 11 Period: Date:
Areas Criteria Scale*
∙have a clearly developed lesson
plan
Lesson
Preparation ∙prepare interesting multimedia
materials
∙give clear directions
∙use an appropriate grouping Instructional
strategy for group activities Strategies
∙provide level-appropriate activities
∙create a warm and accepting Affective
atmosphere Aspects
*1=poor, 2=average, 3=good
Notes
-A fun video clip on acne. Ss loved it.
-T was kind and patient.
-Group activity (same-ability grouping)
󰋻Higher-level students did well. Had no problems.
󰋻Lower-level students had a hard time completing
the task. Seemed like they needed some help.
In one paragraph, identify one strong point and one weak
point of the lesson based on the data above. Support each of
your choices with details from both the checklist and the
notes. In another paragraph, address the problems the
lower-level students are experiencing by suggesting two
possible solutions and supporting them with your rationales.
<수고하셨습니다.>
3
중 면)

이 면은
여백입니다.
